allow: PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://prices.runescape.wiki/api/v1/osrs/mapping" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="osrs-id-check"}; Write-Host "===== Dragon-bolt-related items ====="; $r | Where-Object { $_.name -match "\(?i\)^\(dragon bolt|dragon bolts|feather|broad arrow|broad arrowheads|broad bolts|unfinished broad bolts|bolts \\\(unf\\\)\)" -or $_.name -match "\(?i\)dragon bolts? ?\\\(?unf" -or $_.name -match "\(?i\)dragon bolts? tips" -or $_.name -match "\(?i\)\(feather|wing\)" } | Select-Object id, name | Sort-Object name | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://prices.runescape.wiki/api/v1/osrs/mapping" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="osrs-id-check"}; $p = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://prices.runescape.wiki/api/v1/osrs/latest" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="osrs-id-check"}; $names = @\("Malediction shard 1","Malediction shard 2","Malediction shard 3","Malediction ward","Odium shard 1","Odium shard 2","Odium shard 3","Odium ward","Anti-dragon shield","Draconic visage","Skeletal visage","Dragonfire shield","Dragonfire ward","Spirit shield","Holy elixir","Blessed spirit shield","Uncharged trident","Magic fang","Trident of the swamp"\); foreach \($n in $names\) { $item = $r | Where-Object { $_.name -eq $n } | Select-Object -First 1; if \($item\) { $price = $p.data."$\($item.id\)"; $high = if \($price.high\) { $price.high } else { '-' }; Write-Host \("{0,8}  {1,-30}  high={2}" -f $item.id, $item.name, $high\) } else { Write-Host \("MISSING:  {0}" -f $n\) } })

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://prices.runescape.wiki/api/v1/osrs/mapping" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="osrs-id-check"}; $r | Where-Object { $_.name -match "\(?i\)swamp" -and $_.name -match "\(?i\)trident" } | Select-Object id, name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($r = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://prices.runescape.wiki/api/v1/osrs/mapping" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="osrs-id-check"}; $r | Where-Object { $_.name -match "\(?i\)trident" } | Select-Object id, name | Sort-Object name | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell($p = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://prices.runescape.wiki/api/v1/osrs/latest" -Headers @{"User-Agent"="osrs-id-check"}; "Uncharged toxic trident \(id 12900\) high price: $\($p.data.'12900'.high\)")

PowerShell(python -c "from osrs_herb_margins import RECIPES; tans = [r for r in RECIPES if r.subcategory.startswith\('Tan '\)]; [print\(r.name, '|', r.subcategory, '| inputs:', [\(i.name, i.quantity\) for i in r.inputs], '| extra:', r.extra_cost, '| xp:', r.xp\) for r in tans]")

PowerShell(python -c "from osrs_herb_margins import RECIPES; print\('total:', len\(RECIPES\)\); cats = {}; [cats.setdefault\(r.category, 0\) or cats.update\({r.category: cats[r.category]+1}\) for r in RECIPES]; [print\(' ', k, v\) for k,v in sorted\(cats.items\(\)\)]; print\(\); print\('Farming sample:'\); [print\(' ', r.name, '|', r.subcategory, '| req:', r.level_req, '| xp:', r.xp\) for r in RECIPES if r.category == 'Farming']")

PowerShell(python -c "from osrs_herb_margins import RECIPES; jewelry = [r for r in RECIPES if r.subcategory.startswith\('Jewelry'\)]; print\('Jewelry recipes:', len\(jewelry\)\); [print\(' ', r.name, '|', r.subcategory, '| inputs:', [\(i.name, i.quantity\) for i in r.inputs], '| req:', r.level_req, '| xp:', r.xp, '| f2p:', r.is_f2p\) for r in jewelry]")
PowerShell(python -c "from osrs_herb_margins import RECIPES; d = [r for r in RECIPES if r.name.startswith\('Decant'\)]; print\('decant recipes:', len\(d\)\); [print\(' ', r.name\) for r in d[:9]]")

PowerShell(python -c "from osrs_herb_margins import RECIPES; d = [r for r in RECIPES if r.name.startswith\('Decant'\)]; print\('decant recipes:', len\(d\)\); [print\(' ', r.name.replace\(chr\(0x2192\), '->'\), '|', [\(i.name, i.quantity\) for i in r.inputs], '->', [\(o.name, o.quantity\) for o in r.outputs]\) for r in d[:6]]")

PowerShell(python -c "from osrs_herb_margins import RECIPES; r = [x for x in RECIPES if 'spell' in x.name and 'Black' in x.name][0]; print\('inputs:', [\(i.name, i.quantity\) for i in r.inputs]\); print\('outputs:', [\(o.name, o.quantity\) for o in r.outputs]\)")
